Video.summary: Debbie is in for a shocking surprise when she catches her boyfriend, Terrance, sneaking around with her twin sister.
Video.title: Young vs. Goodwin

Video.summary: Ex-lovers Kaniyah and Bleu feud in court over a stolen pair of limited-edition luxury shoes.
Video.title: Whipple vs. Crawley

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Lomecia confronts Tee over infidelity, family interference and broken trust, demanding a lie detector test to save her marriage.
Video.title: Eason vs. Eason

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: Shawdae and Travis' relationship began with a fight and will end in one, which is why they've asked for the Cutlers' help.
Video.title: McGraw vs. Herrington

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: Andre and Niemah battle in court for parental custody of a beloved pet, Bella.
Video.title: Porch vs. Gillis

Video.summary: The Cutlers' compatibility test helps Victor and Keisha settle a dispute over ugly women in the bedroom.
Video.title: Leaks vs. Holley

Video.summary: The ashes of a deceased pet have exes Tianie and Abner rehashing issues from their recent breakup.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: The results of a double polygraph determine the future of newlyweds Sierra and Victor's marriage.
Video.title: Buckner vs. Banks

Video.summary: Malu sues her girlfriend, L'Mika, because she failed to repay her for a loan and, instead, went on a cruise without her.
Video.title: Mejilla vs. Kargbo

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Newlyweds Eric and Sarah seek the judges' help navigating kids, careers and compatibility.
Video.title: Orive vs. Stark

Video.summary: Sued for car vandalism and other damages, the defendant says the plaintiff is trying to commit fraud and wasting the court's time; litigants dispute unpaid bills and late fees over a water well.
Video.title: Water Well Woes

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: When Queen and Demo are unable to work out their pet issues, the Cutlers help determine how these birds of a feather can stick together.
Video.title: Garrett vs. Williams

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: Angel sues his proclaimed "frienemy with benefits," Celesta, for six months' unpaid rent.
Video.title: Clark vs. Williams

Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: Jail, bail, and a relationship gone stale. The Wallaces come to Cutlers Court for help.
Video.title: Wallace vs Wallace

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: After multiple incidences of cheating resulted in a breakup, Aamonie accuses ex-girlfriend Averiona of stealing her pet dog.
Video.title: Kemper vs. Coleman

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Yumari defends her loyalty and the paternity of her children as Larry questions everything in a custody battle.
Video.title: Hammen vs. Hamrick

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: The limits of polyamorous-turned-monogamous couple Ericka and Rashaad are tested when a surprise witness drops a bomb.
Video.title: Calhoun vs. Sowell

Video.summary: Ricky sues his ex-girlfriend, Jada, saying she stole $800 of his child support money to buy tickets to a Beyoncé concert.
Video.title: Colbert vs. Adams

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris
